topic: ACL main Results/Table 6 load-render gate terminology polish

before_text_matches: page 5 line 340: run through a smoke gate.
page 7 line 069: scenes pass smoke gates.
defect.reader_effect: The term smoke gate was less formal and less consistent with the paper's load/render and stack-entry claim-gate terminology.

changes.summary: Changed the NVIDIA omission sentence to say converted scenes must pass this load/render gate.
Changed the Table 6 caption to the same load/render gate wording.

rejected_iterations.summary: The first Results rewrite introduced page-5 line-end breaks match- and gener-, so it was shortened before acceptance.

after_evidence.targeted_scan_result: Pages 5 and 7 show no alphabetic line-end hyphenation after the accepted rewrite.
after_evidence.full_scan_result: The full after scan reports no body-text line-end hyphenation outside bibliography pages; pages 9-10 retain normal reference-column hyphenation.
after_evidence.terminology_result: smoke gate no longer appears in ACL main Results/table text.
after_evidence.visual_result: The page-5 Results paragraph and page-7 Table 6 caption remain visually stable.

claim_boundary: Results prose and Table 6 caption terminology only. No metric values, evidence pools, figures, citations, metadata, or supported/forbidden claim scopes were changed.
residual_risk: Bibliography pages retain normal reference-column hyphenation.
